teamObjective.explanation: With all clubs and no trumps, our hand is weak. The opening lead should be the lowest card to minimize loss of strength and to give partner a chance to take control. Player 1's small hand increases urgency, but does not justify throwing our best card. play-single-club-3-copy1 best supports the team by conserving value and avoiding premature use of our highest card.
